UAT bug reporting goes straight from the phone to Jira

Manual UAT loses time when evidence, reproduction, and ticket writing happen as separate chores.

Where it removes work

  • Cleaner bug reports
  • Less back-and-forth with engineering
  • Evidence attached while the failure is fresh

What Sysmatic would build

  • Connect device testing, screenshots, and logs
  • Standardize the bug report format
  • Push confirmed findings into Jira with severity and reproduction steps
